title: WasteGrab
summary: A smart recycling pickup and rewards platform connecting customers, collectors, and admins — with AI-assisted waste analysis and map-based route planning.
overview: WasteGrab is an Nx monorepo with an Angular 21 frontend, an Express/Prisma backend, and a shared TypeScript types library. Customers request recyclable pickups with image upload and AI-suggested category, weight, and reward points via Roboflow; collectors manage assigned pickups with MapLibre + OSRM route previews and verify actual weight; admins manage users, categories, collection locations, vouchers, notifications, and reward activity. It includes a reward points ledger, voucher redemption, in-app and web push notifications, and full role-based authentication.
highlights: Full-stack recycling pickup and rewards platform for customers, collectors, and admins (Angular 21, Express, Prisma, MySQL/MariaDB).
Customer pickup requests with image upload, saved addresses, lifecycle tracking, history, and voucher redemption.
Roboflow AI analysis suggests waste category, estimated weight, and reward points before submission — manually adjustable.
Collector workflows: available and assigned pickups, MapLibre + OSRM multi-stop route previews, status updates, and actual-weight verification.
Admin modules for users, collectors, pickups, waste categories, collection locations, vouchers, notifications, and reward activity.
Reward points ledger, in-app and web push notifications, and Nx-based CI/CD with Docker, GitHub Actions, GHCR, and Railway.
